transcript: Speaker A: Confused between this and these? To SpeakX se seekho aur apni English ko flawless banao. [Confused between this and these? Learn from SpeakX and make your English flawless.] Kya 'Is this your house' sahi hai? Ya kya 'Is these your house' sahi hai? [Is 'Is this your house' correct? Or is 'Is these your house' correct?] Agar aapko bhi in basic cheezon mein confusion hoti hai, to aapko apni English grammar ko sudhaarne ki zaroorat hai. [If you get confused by these basics, you need to improve your English grammar.] Bahut log sochte hain ki grammar itni important nahi hai, lekin agar grammar sahi na ho to poore sentence ka meaning hi badal jata hai. [Many think grammar isn't important, but incorrect grammar changes the whole sentence's meaning.] Ab aap soch rahe honge ki kaise karun apni English ko improve? To solution simple hai. [Wondering how to improve your English? The solution is simple.] Bas download karo SpeakX app. Isme ek AI teacher hoti hai jisse aap English grammar, vocabulary, and pronunciation jaisi bahut kuch seekh sakte hain. [Just download the SpeakX app. It has an AI teacher to help you learn grammar, vocabulary, and pronunciation.] Aur seekhane wali AI hai, to aap bejhijhak seekh sakte hain, bina kisi fear of judgment ke, wo bhi sirf 30 dinon mein. [Since it's an AI teacher, you can learn without hesitation or fear of judgment in just 30 days.] SpeakX ko already 10 lakh se bhi zyada log use kar rahe hain. [Over 10 lakh people already use SpeakX.] To aap bhi jaldi se download karein aur acchi English bolna seekhein. [So download quickly and learn to speak good English.]
on_screen_text: This & These? speakX Is this your house Is these your house GRAMMAR VOCABULARY PRONUNCIATION speakX DOWNLOAD NOW Available only on Playstore
summary: The presenter highlights common grammar mistakes like confusing 'this' and 'these' to show the importance of proper English. She promotes the SpeakX app's AI teacher for judgment-free learning of grammar, vocabulary, and pronunciation within 30 days, urging viewers to download it from the Play Store.
